The '''Daragon family''' was a family of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] from the time of the [[Unification Wars (Koros)/Legends|Unification Wars]] until just after the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]].

*[[Hok Daragon]]
*[[Timar Daragon]]
*[[Gav Daragon]]
*[[Jori Daragon]]
